## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run verify` passes (tests, all browser builds, audit)
- [ ] Manually verified in a browser with the built extension
- [ ] Commit messages follow `type: description`
- [ ] No key material, analytics, or new runtime dependencies introduced
- [ ] User-facing strings added to `src/_locales/en/messages.json` (other locales optional; CI checks key parity)
